text.title: C# .NET Core Backend Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply the .NET Core service umbrella end-to-end.

step.name: scaffold-project
step.action: Run `dotnet new webapi -n <Name> -f net8.0`. Replace top-level `Controllers/`, `Services/` with `Features/<Feature>/` folders.

step.name: register-di-and-problem-details
step.action: In `Program.cs`: register `DbContext` Scoped, services Scoped, hosted services via `AddHostedService<T>()`, `AddProblemDetails()`. Validate Generic Host options at startup.
step.decision-gate: If any scoped service is referenced from a singleton, STOP and apply `di-lifetimes` rule via `IServiceScopeFactory`.

step.name: add-controllers-and-services
step.action: For each endpoint: add `[ApiController]` controller in the feature folder, `async Task<ActionResult<T>>` actions, `CancellationToken ct = default` as the last param threaded into the service.
step.decision-gate: Reject any action lacking `CancellationToken` plumbing per `cancellation-token-plumbing` rule.

step.name: add-ef-data-layer
step.action: Add `AppDbContext`, `IEntityTypeConfiguration<T>` per entity, repositories returning materialised lists (never `IQueryable`), `AsNoTracking()` on read paths.
step.decision-gate: If a repository returns `IQueryable`, refactor â€” leaked queries break the contract per `ef-asnotracking-on-reads` rule.

step.name: add-tests
step.action: xUnit unit tests with Moq for service-level behaviour; integration tests with `WebApplicationFactory<Program>` and Testcontainers for the data layer.
step.output: Test project per service + green CI

step.name: add-background-service
step.input: Async work spec (queue consumer / scheduled job)
step.action: Implement `BackgroundService` that injects `IServiceScopeFactory`; resolve scoped dependencies via `CreateScope()` per work item; bound any `Channel<T>` with explicit capacity.
step.decision-gate: If the hosted service constructor names a scoped type, fail the review â€” `scoped-in-singleton` antipattern.
